title: Beneath The Void
description: Adds a New Dimension Beneath The Void
body:
This Mod Adds a New Dimension: The Beneath
New Item to Enter the Beneath: The Echo Resanator Make Sure you Remove the Sculk Veins from the Portal in the Ancient City(before 1.0.6)
There some NEW enchantments, New Structures & Some New Mobs, Im not Gonna List Everything Since you Get a Guide Book When you Enter the Beneath
After 1.0.6, you must make a build made out of reinforced deepslate, sculk, and a catalyst
and then kill a mob nearby it the sculk will be replaced with a fluid which will let you enter the beneath
